entries.definition:
ʾ–j–j to inflame; to incite; to be fast; (of fire) to crackle; (of
water) to be salty, to be bitter. Of this root, أُجَاج ʾujāj occurs three
times in the Qur’an.

أُجَاج ʾujāj [quasi-act. part.] (of water) bitter, salty (56:70) لَوْ نَشَاءُ
جَعَلْنَاهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلاَ تَشْكُرُونَ if We wanted, We could make it [sweet

13
